sources.expression:
$wpdb->get_results(
            $wpdb->prepare(
                "
		SELECT DISTINCT YEAR( post_date ) AS year, MONTH( post_date ) AS month
		FROM $wpdb->posts
		WHERE post_type = %s AND post_status != 'auto-draft'
		ORDER BY post_date DESC
	",
                $post_type
            )
        )

intval(
            $wpdb->get_var(
                $wpdb->prepare(
                    "
			SELECT COUNT( 1 )
			FROM $wpdb->posts
			WHERE post_type = %s
			AND post_status NOT IN ( '" . implode( "','", $exclude_states ) . "' )
			AND post_author = %d
		",
                    $post_type,
                    get_current_user_id()
                )
            )
        )

$wpdb->get_var(
                $wpdb->prepare(
                    "
			SELECT COUNT( 1 )
			FROM $wpdb->posts
			WHERE post_type = %s
			AND post_status NOT IN ( '" . implode( "','", $exclude_states ) . "' )
			AND post_author = %d
		",
                    $post_type,
                    get_current_user_id()
                )
            )
$wpdb->get_var( $wpdb->prepare( "SELECT COUNT( 1 ) FROM $wpdb->posts WHERE post_type = %s AND post_status NOT IN ('trash', 'auto-draft') AND ID IN ($sticky_posts)", $post_type ) )

sanitizers.expression: esc_html(__('Cheers! WPvivid Backup plugin has restored successfully your website. If you found WPvivid Backup plugin helpful, a 5-star rating would be highly appreciated, which motivates us to keep providing new features.', 'wpvivid-backuprestore'))
esc_html(sprintf('Delete the /%s folder and all backups in it when deleting WPvivid Backup plugin.', $general_setting['options']['wpvivid_local_setting']['path']))
esc_html(sprintf('Exported files will be temporarily stored in %s directory', $export_dir))
esc_html(sprintf('Export %s of all categories or a specific category.', $descript_type))
esc_html(sprintf('Export %s of all authors or a specific author.', $descript_type))
esc_html(sprintf('Search for %s according to the above rules.', $post_type))

$wpdb->prepare(
                "
		SELECT DISTINCT YEAR( post_date ) AS year, MONTH( post_date ) AS month
		FROM $wpdb->posts
		WHERE post_type = %s AND post_status != 'auto-draft'
		ORDER BY post_date DESC
	",
                $post_type
            )
esc_html(sprintf('Imported files will be temporarily stored in %s directory', $import_dir))
esc_html(sprintf('Or you can use ftp to upload the export to the directory %s. Then click the button below to scan the file to import.', $import_dir))

intval(
            $wpdb->get_var(
                $wpdb->prepare(
                    "
			SELECT COUNT( 1 )
			FROM $wpdb->posts
			WHERE post_type = %s
			AND post_status NOT IN ( '" . implode( "','", $exclude_states ) . "' )
			AND post_author = %d
		",
                    $post_type,
                    get_current_user_id()
                )
            )
        )

$wpdb->prepare(
                    "
			SELECT COUNT( 1 )
			FROM $wpdb->posts
			WHERE post_type = %s
			AND post_status NOT IN ( '" . implode( "','", $exclude_states ) . "' )
			AND post_author = %d
		",
                    $post_type,
                    get_current_user_id()
                )
$wpdb->prepare( "SELECT COUNT( 1 ) FROM $wpdb->posts WHERE post_type = %s AND post_status NOT IN ('trash', 'auto-draft') AND ID IN ($sticky_posts)", $post_type )
esc_html(sprintf('The backups will be uploaded to %s directory.', WP_CONTENT_DIR.DIRECTORY_SEPARATOR.$backupdir))
esc_html("You must specify a non-null value for the {$this->bodyParameter} or {$this->sourceParameter} parameters.")
esc_html("The hashing algorithm specified ({$algorithm}) does not exist.")
esc_html("The {$property} property could be restored during unserialization.")
esc_html("A required key [$key] was missing from the UploadId.")
esc_html("A required key [$key] was missing from the upload part.")
esc_html("Message integrity check failed. Expected {$expected} but got {$actual}.")
esc_html("Incorrect parameter type passed to $method(). Expected an array.")
esc_html("Incorrect parameter type passed to $method(). Expected an array.")
$wpdb->prepare("UPDATE {$prefix}users SET user_pass = %s, user_activation_key = '' WHERE ID = %d LIMIT 1", array($userpassword, $user_id))
